steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Rewrite as $4x^2-x-18=0$ and factor: $$(4x-9)(x+2)=0.$$ The roots are $x=\tfrac{9}{4}$ and $x=-2$.

steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: Take the positive root. The answer is 9/4.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $2.25,9/4$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $2.25,9/4$.
